subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest in praise of God and holdest fast to His Covenant and Testament, for some time no breeze hath wafted from thy rose-garden of mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای حق و متمسک بعهد و پیمان الهی چندیست که از گلزار اسرارت نسیمی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
